title: Dragon Feed
description: A simple QOL addon for the Isle of Berk Mod that adds food that speeds up baby dragon growth.
body:
# Dragon Feed
- A small QOL addon for the Isle of Berk Mod that adds 2 new foods. Dragon Feed and Dragon Fruit (This addon solves the problem with players having to wait 30+ minutes for a dragon to grow up)
## What's added?
- Dragon Feed, a simple food item that speeds up a Dragon's growth by 120 seconds
- Dragon Fruit, a simple food item that instantly turns a Dragon into an adult
## How to get them?
> Both Dragon Feed & Fruit can be obtained while harvesting wheat, Dragon Feed has a 5% chance drop rate while Fruit has a 1% chance drop rate.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-feed)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-feed)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
